note: Pins the exact mock requests/responses the protected tests exercise. Shapes and status codes come from the official docs; concrete handles, timestamps and fixture values are deterministic mock pins.

query.requestId: UUID, fresh per logical statement, from the injected id factory
query.retry: present and true ONLY on a resubmission of the same requestId after an ambiguous transport failure

body.timeout: seconds, only when the caller sets one
body.bindings: only when binds are passed; object keyed by "1"-based position
body.omitted_fields_rule: unset optional fields must be absent from the JSON body, not null

bool.value: "true" or "false" (bool must be checked before int)

bindings_encoding.rule: every value field is a JSON string

poll.path: exactly the statementStatusUrl returned by the server
poll.rule: call the injected sleeper with the schedule value before each poll; never time.sleep directly

success_200.data_rule: rows are arrays of strings; SQL NULL arrives as JSON null and must surface as Python None

timeout_408.client_rule: raise StatementTimedOut preserving statement_handle and status_url; do not resubmit and do not keep polling

unauthorized_401.client_rule: raise SqlApiError with status 401; the bearer token must never appear in the exception text

idempotent_resubmit.trigger: the POST connection dies before any response line (ambiguous: the server may or may not have executed)
idempotent_resubmit.rule: resubmit exactly once with the SAME requestId plus retry=true; the server deduplicates by requestId so the statement runs once
idempotent_resubmit.first_attempt_rule: the first POST must NOT carry the retry parameter
